zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Kingston於大約1270年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托特沃斯時，她的父親Nicholas Kingston32歲，母親Mrs Nicholas Kingston26歲。她於1287年之前與Sir Peter Veel結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Kingston于大约1270年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托特沃斯时，她的父亲Nicholas Kingston32岁，母亲Mrs Nicholas Kingston26岁。她于1287年之前与Sir Peter Veel结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Kingston was born about 1270, in Tortworth, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Nicholas Kingston, was 32 and her mother, Mrs Nicholas Kingston, was 26. She married Sir Peter Veel before 1287. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Kingston est née environ 1270, à Tortworth, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Kingston, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nicholas Kingston, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Peter Veel avant 1287. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Kingston um 1270 in Tortworth, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Kingston 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs Nicholas Kingston 26. Sie hat vor 1287 Sir Peter Veel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Kingston è nata il circa 1270 nel Tortworth, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Nicholas Kingston, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs Nicholas Kingston, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Peter Veel prima del 1287. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli.

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Kingston(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 그루스스터실르 토르트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Kingston(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Nicholas Kingston(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1287년 이전 Sir Peter Veel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Kingston nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Tortworth, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Kingston, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Nicholas Kingston, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Peter Veel antes 1287. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Kingston родилась около 1270 г. в местности тортворт, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Kingston было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nicholas Kingston, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter Veel перед 1287 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Kingston nació aproximadamente 1270, en Tortworth, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Kingston, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs Nicholas Kingston, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Peter Veel antes de 1287. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
